title: Ascendant Tales
description: A Vanilla+ modpack, focused on bringing a serene and detailed world to adventure, overhauling the survival aspect of Minecraft with new mechanics and hundreds of new mobs.
body:
![Title Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bbe1d824cd70e71e4b67e34e2298e55e010846f3.png)
---
Experience an enriching Minecraft survival modpack, with hundreds of new mobs, biomes, completely overhauled landscapes and dimensions, and so much more.

- ⛰️ **Expanded and Diversified** biomes and dimensions, offering a more rich and pleasant exploration experience
- 🐗 **Overhauled and Beautified** creatures and NPCs, offering more diversity and variety between mobs with overhauled animations.
- 🥇 **Intuitive Skills** to help expand the idea of progression and experience, with level-ups and unique bonuses using attributes.
- 🌡️ **Expanded Survival** mechanics to offer a sense of atmosphere to many biomes, areas and locations such as icey mountains, or scorching hot deserts.
- 🍗 **Detailed and Rich** food system, providing separate nutrition factors, various buffs, food spoilage and more!
- 💀 **Gradual Difficulty Increase** to keep exploration challenging and more intriguing, increasing the further and longer you go on for.
- 🧱 **Expansive Building** for an unremarkable amount of variety and creative opportuntiies when building homes.
- 🔩 **Vanilla-Friendly Create** integration, attempting to stay close to the original feel of the game on technology and advancement in redstone.

## 📝 Installation For Server
The modpack supports server installations and will always have consideration regardless without the need to have a separate installation. Some key notes for mods that need to be disabled/removed from the server side will be listed. However, for the current state of the modlist, you can simply drag and drop the **mods** and **config** folders to the server.

You can also find out which mods are incompatible on the server side by reading the server log and noting any mods that fail to start.

### Incompatible Mods on the Server-Side:
- Distant Horizons
- Immersive Winds

## 📜 Notable Mods
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) and Addons!
- [Farmers Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) and Addons!
- [Frostiful](https://modrinth.com/mod/frostiful) and [Scorchful](https://modrinth.com/mod/scorchful)

- [Incendium](https://modrinth.com/mod/incendium)

### Featured Shaderpacks
- [BSL Shaders](https://bitslablab.com/)
- [Complimentary Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)
